business.title: Presidency formally acknowledges IMANI petition on insurance sector interference
business.description: The Office of the President has formally acknowledged receipt of IMANI Africa's petition raising concerns about political interference in Ghana's insurance sector, assuring the think tank that the matter will be brought to the attention of President John Dramani Mahama for action. In a letter dated April 1, 2026, signed by the Secretary to the President, Callistus Mahama, Ph.D., and bearing reference number ORS307/26/487, the Presidency confirmed receipt of IMANI's correspondence dated March 30, 2026.

science.title: Vacation turns historic as Oakville family watches Artemis II launch
science.description: An Oakville, Manitoba family's spring break vacation turned into a once-in-a-lifetime experience as they witnessed a historic space launch while relaxing on a Florida beach. Rachael Doherty and her family, including her 12-year-old son, Reid, were visiting Cocoa Beach, Florida when they realized that their trip coincided with the launch of Artemis II, NASA's mission set to send four astronauts around the moon. What began as a routine family getaway quickly became something far more memorable.
